heading: Tyrendarra East vs Tyrrell Downs — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Tyrendarra East, Victoria and Tyrrell Downs, Victoria. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Tyrendarra East has a lower overall climate risk score (41/100) compared to Tyrrell Downs (42/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Tyrendarra East or Tyrrell Downs safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Tyrendarra East has a flood risk score of 45/100, while Tyrrell Downs scores 56/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Tyrendarra East scores 55/100 for bushfire risk. Tyrrell Downs scores 39/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Tyrendarra East or Tyrrell Downs?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Tyrendarra East has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.8% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
